items.title: Apple (AAPL) Stock Sinks As Market Gains: What You Should Know
items.description: The latest trading day saw Apple (AAPL) settling at $267.26, representing a -1.38% change from its previous close.

items.title: Under Biden, America got 150 countries to agree a 15% global corporate tax. Under Trump, America gets an exemption
items.description: Scott Bessent called it “a historic victory in preserving U.S. sovereignty and protecting American workers and businesses from extraterritorial overreach."

items.title: Stock market today: Dow jumps 600 points to record, S&P 500 and Nasdaq rally as oil stocks surge after Venezuela strike
items.description: Wall Street is assessing the US military strike and capture of President Maduro in Venezuela, while hopes for AI demand buoy techs.

items.title: Should Investors Be Worried That the "Magnificent Seven" Make Up 35% of the S&P 500?
items.description: At the very least, investors should be concerned. There's a way to avoid the problem, though.
